articles.title: Meta Contractors Posed as Teens to Prompt Rival Chatbots About Suicide, Sex, and Drugs
articles.description: Hundreds of contractors working on a project for Meta pretended to be kids in order to see how other chatbots like Gemini and ChatGPT would respond to high-risk subjects, WIRED found.

articles.title: Scientists Discover Surprising Way To Help the Brain Recover After Stroke
articles.description: A new study suggests that strengthening the body’s natural circadian rhythms may help the brain recover after stroke, even when treatment begins days after the injury. Every year, millions of people survive a stroke, but recovery often continues long after the immediate medical emergency has passed.
